The Vessel

Meet the Montauk

Built for serious fishing, the Montauk is a custom-rigged sport fishing boat designed for both inshore and offshore work. Comfortable, fast, and fully equipped — she's at home in Montauk Harbor or running to the canyons 60 miles offshore.

Every trip is private. No strangers, no party boat crowds. Just you, your crew, and the Atlantic.

Our Trips

Choose your adventure

Half-day, full-day, or overnight — every charter is 100% private. All tackle, bait, and ice included. Just show up ready to fish.

🎣
Half-Day Inshore
4 hours · up to 6 guests · perfect for families and first-timers
$650 / charter
🌊
Full-Day Offshore
10 hours · up to 6 guests · target bluefin, mako, and more
$1,400 / charter
🌙
Overnight Canyon Run
24+ hours · tuna, marlin, and swordfish in the deep canyons
$2,800 / charter
🏆
Corporate & Private Events
Custom duration · team outings, celebrations, bachelor parties
Custom pricing

Montauk Point — "The End"

Where Long Island meets the Atlantic. The most storied fishing grounds on the East Coast — and our backyard for over 20 years.

Meet Your Captain

20 Years. One Boat. One Mission.

"I've been fishing these waters for over two decades. I know every reef, every current, every seasonal pattern. When you're aboard the Montauk, that knowledge works for you."

As the owner and captain of Mission Fisheries, I've spent more than 20 years mastering the waters off Montauk Point — from the shallow inshore reefs of Block Island Sound to the offshore canyons where the big bluefin and white marlin run.

Every charter is personal. I take pride in putting my clients on fish, whether it's a family's first striper or a seasoned angler chasing a canyon slam.

Contact the Captain

Life aboard the Montauk

Real catches. Real clients. Real Montauk.

Target Species

What's biting off Montauk

Montauk Point sits at the convergence of the Atlantic and Long Island Sound — some of the richest fishing grounds on the entire East Coast.

🐟 Striped Bass
🐠 Bluefin Tuna
🦈 Mako Shark
🐟 Fluke / Flounder
🐡 Bluefish
🌊 Albacore
🐟 Porgy / Sea Bass
⚡ Yellowfin Tuna
